description.value:
Frequency once per day

You can craft technology quickly at the expense of safety. Once per day, you can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Craft] an Item you know the formula for with the consumable and tech traits. You can reduce the time it would take to finish Crafting the item to 10 minutes instead of 4 days, and you reduce the materials needed for each 10 minutes of Crafting taken as you seek out more scrap (so by about half). On a critical failure, you cause an explosion and take @Damage[1d6[fire]] damage per item level, destroying the raw materials.
